bargaining_unit_name: International Association of Fire Fighters Local 22
binding_arbitration_statute: Pennsylvania Act 111 (43 P.S. Section 217.1 et seq.)
total_comp_note: AAA Case No. 17-0002-3182-2, Act 111 Interest Arbitration. City-hosted (phila.gov) award document. Term July 1 2017 - June 30 2020; wage increases 3.25% (2017), 3.5% (2018), 3.75% (2019); pension contribution changes.
